response.step_by_step_log:
1. Visual inspection identified "Make It Out Alive" at the start and "Flow" in the final segment. 
2. Searched for '"Make It Out Alive" Laplus Lui Kobo lyrics' and confirmed it's an original Hololive song.
3. Searched for '"Flow" Masayoshi Soken "Final Fantasy XIV" lyrics' and confirmed the composer and song details.
4. Extracted and formatted lyrics for both songs. Performer for 'Flow' identified as Koseki Bijou from the video context.
response.global_summary: A 3-song medley performed by Hololive talents (Laplus, Lui, Kobo) followed by a talk interval, and a final solo cover performance ("Flow") by Koseki Bijou.

scenes.description: Hololive characters Laplus Darknesss, Takane Lui, and Kobo Kanaeru perform their song 'Make It Out Alive' on a neon-lit stage. Song title appears in the top-left corner.
scenes.original_artist: Laplus Darknesss, Takane Lui, Kobo Kanaeru
scenes.performer_in_video: Laplus Darknesss, Takane Lui, Kobo Kanaeru
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Run away, run away, run away
You don't know who to run from
Nowhere to go, don't wanna go, nowhere to go
No road is left to run on
I was born, I was born with horns
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Run away, run away, run away
You don't know who to run from
Nowhere to go, don't wanna go, nowhere to go
No road is left to run on
I was born, I was born with horns

scenes.description: Talk interval featuring character dialogue and stage interactions.
Koseki Bijou performs a solo cover of the song 'Flow'. Song title and credit info appear at the bottom.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Well come and well met, my brave little spark
How long you've wandered, burned bright as a star
Oh, I have long awaited you patiently all this time
Past every fate, now sing with me once more
Share of your life
Far greater than memory
These loss-and-love words can not hold
Boundless, the tale overflows
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
